channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Claude, Yates III lead USC to 70-64 upset of No. 7 Michigan State and snap Spartans' 13-game streak
item.description: Desmond Claude scored 19, Wesley Yates III had 15 and Southern California upset No. 7 Michigan State 70-64 on Saturday afternoon, snapping the Spartans 13-game winning streak.
item.dc:creator: Joe Reedy, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: 3 more massage therapists accuse Ravens' Tucker of sexually inappropriate conduct, report says
item.description: The Baltimore Banner reports that three additional massage therapists have accused Baltimore Ravens kicker Justin Tucker of sexually inappropriate conduct.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: LeBron, Lindsey Vonn, Ronaldo keep going; Faster, stronger and longer, with plenty of help
item.description: Aging athletes such as LeBron James, Cristiano Ronaldo and Lindsey Vonn are similar to racing cars — maintained by tinkering mechanics, data analysts, and shelves of replacement parts “If you look at many elite athletes now, they have an army of supporting staff like a Formula 1 team,” Hirofumi Tana
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WADE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 2025 Royal Rumble: 5 predictions for major WWE premium live event
item.description: The Royal Rumble takes place Saturday night in Indianapolis, and there's no shoo-in for the winners. A lot could happen at the event.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Rangers get center J.T. Miller from Canucks in multiplayer deal
item.description: The New York Rangers acquired veteran center J.T. Miller from the Vancouver Canucks in a multiplayer deal on Friday night. The Rangers sent center Filip Chytil, defenseman Victor Mancini and a 2025 conditional draft pick to Vancouver.
item.dc:creator: VIN A. CHERWOO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sepp Straka leads by 3 at Pebble Beach as rough weather awaits the weekend
item.description: PEBBLE BEACH, Calif. (AP) — Sepp Straka got most of his work done before the weather started to turn Friday in the AT&T Pebble Beach Pro-Am, posting another 7-under 65 for a three-shot lead that left Rory McIlroy, Scottie Scheffler and everyone having to chase him.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Pitcher Michael King, Padres agree to $7.75 million contract, avoid arbitration
item.description: Pitcher Michael King and the San Diego Padres avoided an arbitration hearing when they agreed Friday to a one-year deal guaranteeing $7.75 million.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Teen girls open up on trans athlete scandal that turned their high school into a culture war battleground
item.description: Girls at Martin Luther King High School in California held a live press conference to discuss an ongoing national controversy involving a trans athlete.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Fans wonder if Taylor Swift will perform with Kendrick Lamar at Super Bowl LIX
item.description: Kendrick Lamar is set to take the stage in New Orleans during halftime of Super Bowl LIX and people are wondering who his guests will be.
item.dc:creator: Alyssa Mueller, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bill Walton to be honored at San Diego Gulls game with bobblehead giveaway, specialty jerseys
item.description: The San Diego Gulls will honor NBA legend Bill Walton at their game against the Toronto Marlies on Friday night, with the first 8,000 fans receiving a Bill Walton bobblehead.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: Grand Valley Climbing Gym to host climbing competition
item.description: Zangrilli states, “The coolest thing for us is watching kids that come to us join our program, who have zero climbing experience, very quickly, find a really nice core group of kids on the team, and through that team community, they start to thrive.
item.dc:creator: Kyle Kawamoto, KREX 5

item.title: Brotherly love; UCSD's basketball brother-duo team up
item.description: Out at UC San Diego, the Tritons have been riding a wave of success this season as they currently sit at 17-4 with their eyes set on taking the Big West. A team fueled by relationships that go deeper than you may even know, UCSD guard Chris Howell and Assistant Coach Mikey Howell teaming up.
item.dc:creator: Fox 5

item.title: NFL kicker Justin Tucker accused of sexual misconduct by 6 masseuses: report
item.description: Justin Tucker, kicker for the Baltimore Ravens, has been accused by six massage therapists at four separate businesses of sexually inappropriate behavior, the Baltimore Banner reported Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, WGN 9

item.title: One of the Oklahoma's best high school wrestling team's season suspended
item.description: A disciplinary decision from the Oklahoma Secondary Schools Activities Association (OSSAA) has ended the season for the girls wrestling team at Edmond North High School.
item.dc:creator: Sydnee Batzlaff/KFOR, NewsNation

item.title: Girls Basketball: Francis Parker 46, La Jolla Country Day 45
item.description: KUSI (SAN DIEGO) - Marquee matchup out at Francis Parker as they play host to La Jolla Country Day. Francis Parker's Brianna Mendez and Isabella Riddle would combine for 28 points on the night, leading the charge in their 46-45 win over La Jolla Country Day.. a feat some may had not seen coming.
item.dc:creator: Bri Savant, Fox 5

item.title: Super Bowl LIX will be 'No Drone Zone' amid incursions
item.description: Airspace over the Caesars Superdome in New Orleans will be heavily restricted from drones during Super Bowl LIX.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, NewsNation

item.title: Warriors to retire Andre Iguodala's No. 9 jersey
item.description: As Andre Iguodala moves around town in the Bay Area these days, he is regularly stopped by fans eager to praise him for how he carried himself while playing for the Golden State Warriors.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: UVU hoping to make first NCAA Tournament
item.description: OREM, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Duke, Michigan State, Auburn, Houston andUtah Valley? All of those college basketball teams own double-digit winning streaks right now, with the Wolverines having just won their tenth in a row.
item.dc:creator: Wesley Ruff, ABC 4

item.title: Utah HC ends road trip with 3-1 loss at Ottawa
item.description: OTTAWA (ABC4 Sports) - Leevi Merilainen made 34 saves, and the Ottawa Senators won 3-1 against the Utah Hockey Club at Canadian Tire Centre on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Taylor Swift watches boyfriend Travis Kelce and the Chiefs beat the Bills and get back to Super Bowl
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — You could say that Taylor Swift's championship era has reached its second consecutive season.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: The Chiefs get more Mahomes magic and advance to 3rd straight Super Bowl, beating the Bills 32-29
item.description: Patrick Mahomes threw for 245 yards and a touchdown, ran through the Buffalo defense for two more scores, and relied on his defense at key moments to help the Kansas City Chiefs beat the Bills 32-29 on Sunday night and reach the Super Bowl for the third consecutive season.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: UVU wins 10th straight game, beating Seattle 70-66
item.description: SEATTLE (ABC4 Sports) - There is no slowing down the Utah Valley men's basketball team right now. Carter Welling scored a career-high 24 points, and Dominick Nelson added 16 as Utah Valley earned a hard-fought 70-66 road win over Seattle U on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
